title: Overwrite column with new information
excerpt:
Hi,  What is everyone recommendation on the best way to bulk change data in a column. I often need to update product expiration dates. 
Thank you 
Kim

posts.author: Kimbersh (Kimberly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, What is everyone recommendation on the best way to bulk change data in a column. I often need to update product expiration dates.

Thank you
Kim

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Kimbersh,

You can use batch actions for that. This involves selecting all the items you want to change the date for and change for one of those items. All the other items in the selection will also be changed. You can read more on that here.
